title: Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results

Financial Performance

Revenue for the third quarter was $1,373 million, compared to $1,189 million in the prior year, representing a 15% year-over-year increase. The company beat analyst estimates of $1.36 billion.

Profitability Metrics

Net loss was $153 million in Q3 2024, compared to $368 million in the prior year, a significant improvement. Adjusted EBITDA was $132 million, compared to $40 million in the prior year, reflecting strong operational improvements.

User Growth and Engagement

Daily active users were 443 million in Q3 2024, an increase of 9% year-over-year. Monthly active users reached approximately 956 million. Snapchat+ subscriptions exceeded 12 million paying subscribers, more than doubling year-over-year.

Revenue Diversification

Advertising revenue increased 10% year-over-year to $1.25 billion. Other revenue more than doubled to $123 million, driven by Snapchat+ subscriptions and hardware sales from Spectacles.

Q4 Guidance

Management provided Q4 revenue guidance of $1.51-1.56 billion, representing growth of 10-14% year-over-year, with the midpoint slightly below analyst consensus of $1.56 billion.
